notes: Wi-Fi panel fixed from your testing: it now names the network you are on (with a Disconnect button), remembers passwords for networks you have used before, and the on/off switch works. The Quill Haven name on the home screen is now a baked-in drawing, so it can never flash or change shape while loading. And a big safety fix: only Quill Haven itself can ask the laptop to open a terminal, restart, or update — web pages can no longer reach those controls.
